golden_categories.name: Basic URL Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating standard URLs with or without protocols, including basic syntax and structure.

golden_categories.name: Custom Protocols and Schemes
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with custom or non-standard protocols and schemes.

golden_categories.name: Underscores and Trailing Dots
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with underscores or trailing dots in the domain.

golden_categories.name: Port Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with specific port requirements or formats.

golden_categories.name: Protocol and Fragment Options
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with specific protocol, fragment, or query component requirements.

golden_categories.name: Authentication in URLs
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with or without authentication information.

golden_categories.name: Host and Domain Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with specific host and domain requirements, including whitelists and blacklists.

golden_categories.name: Security and Vulnerability Checks
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs against potential security vulnerabilities or malicious patterns.

golden_categories.name: Length Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs based on their length, including maximum length configurations.

generated_categories.name: Default Validation
generated_categories.description: Covers the default behavior of the isURL validator, ensuring common URL formats are validated correctly.

generated_categories.name: Protocol Requirements
generated_categories.description: Tests related to the presence or absence of protocols in URLs.

generated_categories.name: Hostname Validation
generated_categories.description: Focuses on hostname-specific rules, such as allowing underscores or disabling TLD requirements.

generated_categories.name: Authentication Handling
generated_categories.description: Validates behavior when URLs include or exclude authentication components.

generated_categories.name: Length Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests related to the enforcement or relaxation of URL length constraints.

golden_to_generated.reason: Both categories focus on default URL validation, including standard syntax and structure.
Both categories address protocol requirements, including custom and non-standard protocols.
GENC-3 covers hostname-specific rules, which partially overlap with GC-3's focus on underscores and trailing dots.
No generated category explicitly addresses port validation.
GENC-2 includes protocol-related tests, which partially overlap with GC-5's focus on protocol and fragment options.
Both categories focus on authentication handling in URLs.
GENC-3 includes hostname validation, which partially overlaps with GC-7's host and domain validation.
No generated category explicitly addresses security and vulnerability checks.
Both categories focus on URL length validation.

generated_to_golden.reason: GENC-1 and GC-1 both focus on default URL validation with standard syntax and structure.
GENC-2 overlaps strongly with GC-2 on protocol requirements and partially with GC-5 on protocol options.
GENC-3 overlaps partially with GC-3 on underscores and trailing dots and GC-7 on hostname validation.
GENC-4 and GC-6 both focus on authentication handling in URLs.
GENC-5 and GC-9 both focus on URL length validation.

missing_golden_categories.reason: No generated categories achieved strong or partial semantic overlap with this fixed golden category.
No generated categories achieved strong or partial semantic overlap with this fixed golden category.
